mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending, causing immediate equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: Positive returns exceed 55% of triggered instances over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and capital investment demand, driving sustained equity appreciation.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 compared to individual series.

mechanism_narrative: In late-cycle expansions, marginal increases in industrial production reflect capacity utilization peaks and pricing power, generating short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses or becomes statistically insignificant during late-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP reflects underlying economic expansion, which translates into higher corporate earnings and positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are uncorrelated with GDP growth direction across multiple cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy and margin compression, leading to negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in greater than 60% of high-inflation trigger months.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirm robust labor market tightening, supporting consumer confidence and equity valuations.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to outperform a baseline model with a p-value greater than 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: During tightening cycles, a decline in real personal consumption expenditures signals demand destruction ahead of earnings revisions, causing rapid equity drawdowns.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive accuracy with Rank IC below 0.02 specifically during tightening regimes.
